sections.paragraph:
- Original: πλοῦτος

- Transliteration: Ploutos

- Phonetic: ploo'-tos

- Definition:

1. riches, wealth

a. abundance of external possessions

b. fulness, abundance, plenitude

c. a good i.e. that with which one is enriched

- Origin: from the base of G4130

- TDNT entry: 11:18,9

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From the base of G4130; wealth (as fulness) that is (literally) money possessions or (figuratively) abundance richness (specifically) valuable bestowment: - riches.
